chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Person Performing Hajj or Tawaf on Behalf of Another or Sharing a Hajj

text: رَجُلٌ لِلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ نَوَيْتُ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ فِي حَجَّتِي اَلْعَامَ أُمِّي أَوْ بَعْضَ أَهْلِي فَنَسِيتُ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «اَلْآنَ فَأَشْرِكْهُمَا».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2973 - A man said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
"May I be your ransom! I had intended to include my mother or some of my family in my Hajj this year, but I forgot."
Imam (as) replied: "Do it now; include them both."
